title: Cyanobacteria Trace Metal Mixture (CTMM)

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dtli","text":"All chemicals used for cultivating cyanobacteria should be of the highest quality.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97v08","text":"All re-useable glassware and plastic should be acid-washed and autoclaved.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1719u","text":"Use only plastic or teflon spatulas or dust-free weigh paper for weighing out chemicals.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Weigh out 0.435 g Na 2 EDTA·2H 2 O using dust-free weigh paper Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid disodium salt dihydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E4884
Transfer into 100 mL volumetric flask filled with 60 mL Milli-Q water
Dissolve Na 2 EDTA by inserting the stopper and inverting flask several times May have to heat 5 min at 80°C to dissolve.
Weigh out 0.32 g FeCl 3 ·6H 2 O using dust-free weigh paper
Dissolve FeCl 3 into same volumetric flask and mix by inverting several times

Individually add and dissolve 100 µl of each of the six primary trace metal stocks described in the Primary Trace Metal Stocks protocol. The six primary trace metals to add are ZnSO 4 , CoCl 2 , MnCl 2 , Na 2 MoO 4 , Na 2 SeO 3 and NiCl 2 . https://www.protocols.io/view/Primary-trace-metal-stocks-c8hzt5
Adjust volume to 100mL mark with Milli-Q water
Using a polycarbonate syringe, filter through 0.2µm syringe filter into a sterile, acid-washed teflon or polycarbonate container in a laminar flow hood
Store sterile CTMM (cyanobacteria trace metal mixture) at 4°C
creator: Bonnie Poulos
